quoteLast: on the morning of the third day following.

quoteFirst: The next morning, after drinking some coffee, the sickness was renewed; nevertheless,
quoteLast: , she repaired to her employment, which was distant an hour’s walk; she probably suffered much on the way, for she did not arrive until 9 A.M.
